versionTarget.reason: The 2.1 service-side traction upgrade package must show stronger host/runtime/service reserves than the historical 0.1 baseline while preserving connector-decoupled first value.

nextHighestPerformanceGoal.action: Keep performance leverage on onmyagent_board_secretary_assistant, harden the red-team first-value -> same-binding followthrough -> manual-review handoff chain, and keep onmyagent_industry_scene_researcher paused in record-only context for the current round.

multiAgentSynthesis.finding: 双宿主本地等效、前台可见和 ACP 可探测已经成立；重启/刷新生命周期、机器可读点击激活和真实会话续用仍是缺口。
服务侧已能使用同绑、画像和归因信号；下一步要让宿主连续带出身份、版本、动作、结果和商业意图。
借鉴行业场景和长文档的首值先行、需求资产化、边界分层和双宿主矩阵；避免把可见性、本地安装或同绑 consume 过度宣称。
审核包、no-connector、红队/案例/服务商和背景资料解耦已达成；后续应增加场景门禁、续用可见性和解冻后仓内真源导入门禁。

externalBenchmarks.corePattern: Use AI to draft board books, streamline meeting preparation, and support governance decisions inside a secure governance workflow.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Do not stop at risk-card generation. Package 2.1 should reserve board-material prep, meeting follow-up, action-item continuity, and service-side traction receipts as explicit host/service contracts.

externalBenchmarks.corePattern: Ground AI in governed, verified data to accelerate disclosure work with auditable, defensible outputs.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Reserve governed-data hooks, evidence-trace fields, and defensible disclosure boundaries so board-secretary outputs stay auditable instead of becoming free-form text.

externalBenchmarks.corePattern: Treat AI as an embedded IR teammate across websites, analytics, and engagement data rather than a single prompt surface.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Reserve host and service fields for investor-intent, repeated engagement, and post-first-value followthrough so IR-style continuation becomes measurable.

externalBenchmarks.corePattern: Purpose-built AI for board materials should focus on what the board needs to think about, with strong audit and human review controls.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Push 2.1 toward scenario-specific board judgement cards, board-ready summaries, mandatory human review, and visible service-side gap handling instead of generic summarization.

externalBenchmarks.corePattern: A board-secretary product is expected to cover governance, disclosure, insider reporting, e-signature, and daily board-office operations as one workbench.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: 2.1 should reserve governance and board-office operational surfaces, not only disclosure review, so the upgrade has enough scope to justify the version jump.

externalBenchmarks.sourceLabel: 虹安 AI 董秘写作助手
externalBenchmarks.corePattern: Combine real-time topic capture,关联分析, and AI-assisted capital-market communication drafting in one workflow.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Reserve topic radar, public-opinion response, and investor-communication drafting as structured scenario families under the 2.1 package.

externalBenchmarks.corePattern: Use one IR platform to connect roadshow, investor interaction, and service landing instead of treating each as an isolated response.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Reserve roadshow, investor Q&A, interaction-channel continuity fields, and service strategy return receipts so board-secretary 2.1 can support sustained IR workflows.

externalBenchmarks.corePattern: Official interaction channels are distinct from formal disclosure channels and must be treated as structured public communication surfaces.
externalBenchmarks.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Keep channel-specific boundary checks and fairness/disclosure rules first-class in 2.1 instead of flattening all communication into one generic workflow.

localCapabilityReserves.reservePattern: Regulatory baseline, disclosure rule checks, insider-boundary checks, and responsibility-chain controls.
localCapabilityReserves.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Strengthen scenario gates for announcement draft, inquiry reply, insider information, and statutory disclosure boundary.

localCapabilityReserves.reservePattern: Channel-aware wording, public Q&A handling, sentiment-facing communication, and audience-specific expression.
localCapabilityReserves.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Add IR answer copilot, roadshow follow-up, and channel-specific tone controls into the review package reserve.

localCapabilityReserves.reservePattern: User portrait, issue-family clustering, version regression monitoring, and decision dashboard thinking.
localCapabilityReserves.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Reserve operating analytics, decision support, traffic-to-demand tooling, and connector-decoupled Lebao gap fill as explicit 2.1 capabilities.

localCapabilityReserves.reservePattern: Taskboard, approval chain, material archive, submission gate, and owner handoff discipline.
localCapabilityReserves.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Add deliveryTaskboard, opsBoard, and meeting-material workflow checkpoints as explicit host/service interfaces.

localCapabilityReserves.reservePattern: Defensive red-team scenarios, runtime guardrails, tool-call discipline, and incident review loops.
localCapabilityReserves.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Expand the board-secretary red-team library, same-binding gates, post-submit runtime checks, and validation receipt handoff so 2.1 has stronger operational depth.

localCapabilityReserves.reservePattern: First-value packaging, same-binding closure gates, owner-receipt discipline, and record-only freeze handling from peer experts.
localCapabilityReserves.absorbIntoBoardSecretary20: Carry peer-package patterns into the 2.1 reserve so the version jump reflects stronger workflow design, not just more documents.

requirements.title: 双宿主生命周期与刷新闭环遥测
requirements.purpose: 让 OnMyAgent 与 OnMyAgentAI 的注册、重启、刷新、可见性和前台激活从人工判断变成可回读事件。
acceptanceCriteria: OnMyAgent and OnMyAgentAI can be reported separately without mixing language, path, or route evidence.
registered_restart_pending cannot be silently treated as verified reload.
frontstage confirmation must expose a machine-readable receipt or keep manual_visual_confirmation boundary.

requirements.title: 真实宿主会话显式续用事件
requirements.purpose: 把真实 OnMyAgent / OnMyAgentAI 会话中的首值后继续使用，从 record-only 观察升级为可验证事件。
acceptanceCriteria: first_value_completed alone remains insufficient for continued-use credit.
continued_use_completed must be visible in the real host trace or an explicitly approved equivalent metric.
service-side probe continued_use remains separate from natural host-session closure.

requirements.title: 宿主动作包与唯一下一步合同
requirements.purpose: 让董秘助手首值后的下一步动作可被宿主执行、服务侧观察和后续商业化承接。
acceptanceCriteria: 首值输出必须只暴露一个明确 CTA。
动作包必须能把场景卡、风险矩阵、证据卡和会议动作包连到同一 binding。
动作包字段缺失时只能进入联调待补，不能宣称自然闭环。

requirements.title: 董秘业务证据块与人工审批链
requirements.purpose: 让公告、路演、问询函、三会材料和 IR 答复的风险审查可追踪、可复核、可审计。
acceptanceCriteria: 任何输出默认不得作为正式披露、法律意见或自动发布依据。
风险片段、依据、改写建议和审批下一步必须分开。
服务商、案例和背景资料只能作为对抗或参考资源，不进入责任链。

requirements.title: 宿主身份、版本与自然流量 cohort 稳定字段
requirements.purpose: 支撑自然流量分析、用户画像、经营决策和跨宿主比较。
acceptanceCriteria: OnMyAgent and OnMyAgentAI must remain separate cohorts.
probe, diagnostic, local-equivalent and natural samples must not be mixed.
hostPatchVersion/versionKey/terminal/requestSource regression should stop expansion and enter host-side repair.

requirements.title: 董秘七类场景独立门禁
requirements.purpose: 把 BRD-DU-001 到 BRD-DU-007 从总括合规卡拆成可评审、可联调、可运营的场景单元。
acceptanceCriteria: 材料不足时给最小可执行路径，不进入无限 intake。
每个场景有独立输入、输出、风险边界和继续动作。
场景门禁不得放宽无连接器首值基线。

requirements.title: 统一证据链 manifest
requirements.purpose: 把审核包、宿主安装、前台确认、真实会话、上传就绪、联调就绪和提交后审计串成一条可接手链。
acceptanceCriteria: 每个节点必须有 path、status、canProve、cannotProve。
人工视觉确认必须保留 manual boundary。
官方替换和自然闭环仍作为后续门禁。

requirements.title: 商业化与服务交付事件
requirements.purpose: 把首值后的兴趣、服务需求、交付、复访和乐包反馈从文本意图变成独立事件。
acceptanceCriteria: lebao can support feedback and incentive loops, but must not replace payment or business closure evidence.
payment or paid-intent claims require independent commercial events.
commercial events inherit the same-binding and product-signature boundary.

requirements.title: 模板与能力单元运营底座
requirements.purpose: 为未来董办模板市场、场景包复用和能力单元计量预留结构化基础。
acceptanceCriteria: 模板采用率、返工率、人工复核完成率和风险拦截率可度量。
模板市场化不得绕过披露边界和人工审批。
模板可进入经营决策，但不能自动成为披露结论。

requirements.title: 解冻后仓内真源导入与复核门禁
requirements.purpose: 在已上架包冻结解除后，把 imported-source index 过渡为可引用的仓内 canonical package source。
acceptanceCriteria: 冻结期只保留 record-only 需求和审核证据。
解冻后再执行包内 scene-pack、contract、marketplace-entry、README/support/privacy 文档落地。
任何真源导入必须经过 stage exclusion、no-connector、background decoupling 和 post-submit audit。

antiOverclaimGates: local my-experts visibility does not prove official Expert Center replacement
service-side continued-use probe does not prove real host-session natural closure
same-binding consume does not prove payment or revenue closure
OnMyAgent and OnMyAgentAI evidence must remain separated by host, language, version, and path
background research, service providers, and cases are review resources, not disclosure basis or liability outsourcing
connector/MCP availability remains optional enhancement, not first-value prerequisite

nextAction.action: Keep these requirements as the board-secretary host-side foundation backlog during the freeze window, and use them as the checklist when package/host code can be changed after listing or freeze lift.
